title: godetia hispidula
intro: Godetia hispidula, also known as the sticky godetia, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Godetia hispidula is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
